seoDescription: Giant Quetzalcoatlus pterosaur soaring high over a landscape of active volcanoes. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Quetzalcoatlus soaring over Volcanoes was named after Quetzalcoatl, the feathered serpent god of Aztec mythology.
Quetzalcoatlus soaring over Volcanoes was a pterosaur from the Late Cretaceous and one of the largest flying creatures to ever exist, with a wingspan of 36 feet.
